programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: A failed assassination unleashes claims of a mind-controlled gunman; Andrew investigates the CIA's legacy of MK-Ultra, and stages a shocking experiment with mentalist Max Major to test whether a person really can be hypnotized into becoming an assassin.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh braves Puerto Rico's seas to find a missing plane; the crash of Pan Am's Clipper Endeavor changed commercial aviation forever; Josh and the team fight violent storms in the Atlantic as they hunt for the plane 2,000 feet below.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: In World War II's closing days, 18 American servicewomen were lost off the Ivory Coast. Armed with new technology and fresh insights from the crash archives, Josh joins Project Recover to guide the search for the heroines' lost C47 plane.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Gold Rush's Parker Schnabel joins Josh Gates to investigate an infamous California stagecoach robbery gone bad; fighting a driving rainstorm, Josh leans on Parker's gold mining expertise to close in on the $10M lost treasure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh braves the Oregon coast to search for the real-life pirate treasure that inspired his all-time favorite movie; on the rocky shores of the Pacific, he finds pieces of a Spanish galleon that wrecked in 1694.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh braves the South Carolina swamps to search for the lost treasure of the infamous Anne Bonny; the pirate queen used her wits, beauty and daring to steal millions in booty; Josh may have unearthed Anne's secret trading post.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: From a secret World War II unit that deceived Nazis, to the alleged crimes of the Knights Templar and a royal death tied to a scandal, Josh Gates explores mysteries built on coverups; was the truth buried to protect power, reputation and empires?

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh braves the South Carolina swamps to search for the lost treasure of the infamous Anne Bonny; the pirate queen used her wits, beauty and daring to steal millions in booty; Josh may have unearthed Anne's secret trading post.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: From a secret World War II unit that deceived Nazis, to the alleged crimes of the Knights Templar and a royal death tied to a scandal, Josh Gates explores mysteries built on coverups; was the truth buried to protect power, reputation and empires?

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programme.desc: A roulette dealer discovers a way to cheat for his favorite customers; a cocky pool hustler gets held at gunpoint; a high-stakes gambler ends up in a Vegas car chase with $4.5 million in cash in his back seat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: A major Alaskan rainstorm triggers a landslide that threatens Team Turin's camp; in a bid to make up on the gold, Dave has an idea that speeds up production but puts The Roach in a vulnerable position.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Artemis 1: Going Back to the Moon
programme.desc: Following the inside story of NASA engineers as they race to build and launch the rocket, Artemis I, as it prepares for missions that will transport humans to the moon, then launch a journey to Mars and beyond.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Train Rails; Desalinated Water; Racing Wheelchairs
programme.desc: Follow the manufacturing processes behind train rails, desalinated water, racing wheelchairs and parquetry flooring.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the infamous Billy the Kid may have lived to old age under an assumed name; modern scholars explore the true identity of the "Man in the Iron Mask.".

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: What really happened to union boss Jimmy Hoffa? Could modern technology finally prove the existence of the Holy Grail? And did inventor Rudolf Diesel really die at sea, or did he stage his own disappearance?

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A real-life child whose possession inspired "The Exorcist"; a con artist leaves a trail of deception and perhaps, even murder; an ancient army is defeated by hallucinogenic honey; these three stories prove that truth can outmatch fiction.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates steps into the past to examine unsolved mysteries; featuring the alleged alien abduction of Travis Walton, the bizarre death of American hero Charles Lindbergh's son, and the invisible attacks visited upon CIA operatives in Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Responding to recent UFO sightings, Josh Gates sends his team to New Mexico for a new investigation into the infamous, unsolved Socorro Landing Incident; using never-before-used technology and with new witnesses, Jess and Phil look to solve Socorro.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess probe the science behind a strange phenomenon while investigating mysterious objects flying around Mexico's tallest active volcano.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess investigate Utah's Uintah Basin, a region teeming with paranormal activity -- including numerous UFO sightings, cattle mutilations and reports of shape-shifting creatures.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess continue their investigation into Utah's infamous Uintah Basin, where reports of UFO encounters have terrified locals; the team uncovers stunning new evidence when attempting to contact extraterrestrials.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Artemis II: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: NASA sends Americans back to the Moon for the first time in over 50 years -- farther than any humans have traveled, and in a new spacecraft. From mission prep to splashdown on Earth, join the Artemis II crew on this historic 10-day voyage of exploration.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: The team tests if NASA really did land on the Moon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates boldly explores members' most heart-pounding journeys into space; Apollo 13 astronauts fight to bring their crippled spacecraft 238,000 miles back to Earth and futuristic SpaceShipOne could give others a chance to travel to space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Artemis II: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: NASA sends Americans back to the Moon for the first time in over 50 years -- farther than any humans have traveled, and in a new spacecraft. From mission prep to splashdown on Earth, join the Artemis II crew on this historic 10-day voyage of exploration.

programme.title: Harpoon Hunters
programme.desc: With less than a quarter of the bluefin quota still available to catch, a change in weather forces captains to shift their strategy; Tyler quickly scores three big fish; Joe takes to the air, he spots a lone tuna, then races to find it at sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: As Jason battles a flooded cut, Team Turin's latest super weapon in the hunt for gold arrives in Alaska; the crew must navigate the 34-ton machine across the river by creating a mobile dam.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow; first, they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: It's the Raneys' first Florida rescue; a single mom is struggling against an overflowing swamp caused by devastating tropical storms; severe flooding has brought an invasion of gators; the Raneys must be more inventive than ever to save them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A single mom watches her family's dream of a Big Island coffee farm fade; under threat from wild hogs, invasive bamboo and a lack of water, the Raneys must clear a path to survival.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Two young couples in Alaska struggle with their homestead near the Arctic Circle; but with no access, no water and no shelter, survival is impossible; the Raneys must engineer all-season solutions for the harshest climate they've ever faced.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: With a family facing ruin, setbacks and soaring debt on their BC mine, it's up to Juan and prospecting experts Jeff and Sophia Bond to save them; using 6,000 pounds of steel, Juan creates his largest-ever hopper build to get a massive gold increase.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: In the Yukon, Freddy and Juan tackle their most extensive treasure hunt yet; 288 claims across 6,000 acres and double the breakdowns; as the seconds tick away on the miner's season, the duo teams up with a local expert to find the gold.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
